title: London Town
writer: Elliot Paul, Sig Herzig, Val Guest
actors: Sid Field, Greta Gynt, Tessie O'Shea
plot: An aging music-hall performer returns to London believing he's the star of a new show. When he discovers that he's only slated to be the understudy, his daughter sabotages the revue's star in order to get him back into the spotlight.
